texto: The things we earnestly chased like they are inevitable
autor: now we see them and pass by....that's what i call GROWTH. Some will take 20 yrs to know this growth but those that feed on the Word have instant growth and prosperity. God be praised
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a now we see them and pass by....that's what i call GROWTH. Some will take 20 yrs to know this growth but those that feed on the Word have instant growth and prosperity. God be praised: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The things we earnestly chased like they are inevitable” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, kingsley-ofosu-ampong, things pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
